# registrations

Extracts runtime registration metadata (MCP tools, jobs, trigger-events) from each plugin's
server and central barrel imports by reading `def.register[]`.

Unlike static-analysis facets (commands, slots, resources), this facet needs the barrel-imported
modules — it reads the `importedModules` field of `ExtractContext`, which is populated by
`buildPluginTree()` when `skipBarrelImport` is not set.

No `relate()` — registrations have no cross-plugin relationships.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Core:
  - Uses: `plugin-meta/facets.defineFacet`
  - Exports (types): `DocMetaRegistration`
  - Exports (values):
    - `registrationsFacetDef`
    - `registrationsToComparable`
- Sub-plugins:
  - **`render-contributions`** — Aggregated cross-plugin registrations table in the Studio Contributions view.
  - **`render-detail`** — Per-plugin registrations section in the plugin detail pane.
  - **`render-diff`** (disabled — cascade) — Diff renderer for the registrations facet (PR review).

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
